title: Beilschmiedia wallichiana
taxonomy: Beilschmiedia wallichiana belongs to the family Lauraceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the laurel family. This family is part of the larger order Laurales, which includes other flowering plant families such as Atherospermataceae and Calycanthaceae. Beilschmiedia wallichiana is a species of evergreen tree native to the Himalayas and the Himalayan foothills. Its classification includes being a member of the genus Beilschmiedia, which comprises various species of trees native to tropical and subtropical regions. The species Beilschmiedia wallichiana is a part of the kingdom Plantae, which encompasses all types of plants.

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
